MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Feb-01-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT CORELOGIC RENTAL PROPERTY SOLUTIONS, LLC'S MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. The verified application of Pamela Q. Devata to appear as counsel pro hac vice to defendant is granted. No opposition filed, and the application conforms to Cal. R. Ct. 9.40.

Counsel for the defendant is required to prepare and submit a proposed order which states that the motion was not opposed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/EPS)
